summary: SUMMIT ENHANCEMENTS features tested - Service Mode, Attendance Streak, and Prayer Request system. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Portal Home components, Prayer page tabs, category filters, and prayer request creation flow.

service_mode_api.details: Returns is_service_day, is_service_time, attendance_streak, check_in_status, current_day. Today is Monday so is_service_day=false (expected).

service_checkin_api.details: Creates check-in record, handles duplicate check-ins gracefully.

prayer_categories_api.details: Returns all 8 categories: general, healing, family, financial, guidance, thanksgiving, salvation, relationships.

prayer_request_create.details: Successfully creates prayer requests with category, title, content, is_public, is_anonymous fields.

prayer_wall.details: Returns public prayer requests, supports category filtering.

pray_for_request.details: Increments prayer count, tracks user prayers to prevent duplicates.

admin_prayer_dashboard.details: Admin can access prayer dashboard with stats. Member access properly denied (403).

components_verified: Attendance Streak Card - displays current streak, best streak, total services, next badge progress
Prayer Wall Card - shows recent public prayer requests with View All link
Streak Badge on Welcome Banner - shows '1 Week Streak!' badge
Quick Actions (Give Now, My Groups, Upcoming Events)
Prayer Wall tab - displays public requests with pray buttons
My Requests tab - shows user's own requests with status
Category filters (All, General, Healing, Family, etc.)
New Prayer Request button opens modal
Prayer Request Modal with category selection, title, content, share options
Pray button increments count and changes to 'Prayed' state

ui_tests_passed: Portal Home page loads with data-testid='portal-home'
Attendance Streak Card visible with streak data
Prayer Wall Card preview on home page
Quick action buttons present and clickable
Solomon Widget loads with personalized message
Prayer Wall tab and My Requests tab functional
Category filters filter requests correctly (tested Healing filter)
Pray button increments count from 1 to 2
New Prayer Request modal opens with form
Prayer request creation via UI (Guidance category, public)
Newly created request appears in My Requests tab
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_service_mode_prayer.py - Created new test file for Summit Enhancements
seed_data_creation: Test prayer requests created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests. UI test created 'UI Test Prayer Request' in Guidance category.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Summit Enhancements (Service Mode, Attendance Streak, Prayer System) fully functional. Service Mode banner only shows on Sundays/Wednesdays. Today is Monday so is_service_day=false. Member has 1 week streak after check-in. Prayer Wall has 7 public requests visible. Prayer categories include: general, healing, family, financial, guidance, thanksgiving, salvation, relationships.

mocked_apis_note.value: None - all features are fully implemented
mocked_apis_note.note: No mocked APIs. Service Mode, Attendance Streak, and Prayer features are fully functional with MongoDB persistence.
